requirements.summary: Fix the click-to-open interaction on the Envelope component so that clicking the envelope (or its wax seal / 'click to open' prompt) correctly toggles the open state, causing the letter panel to rise out of the envelope as intended.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking anywhere on the closed envelope triggers the open animation and the letter panel rises out.
The open/closed toggle state is correctly tracked in React state.
No JavaScript console errors occur when clicking the envelope.
Clicking again (or a close button if present) returns the envelope to its closed state.
The wax seal and any 'click to open' label are visually interactive (cursor: pointer) and respond to click events.

file_operations.description: Fix the click event handler to properly toggle the open state when the envelope or wax seal is clicked. Ensure the click handler is attached to the correct DOM elements (envelope container, wax seal, and any 'click to open' prompt). Add cursor: pointer styling to interactive elements. Verify that the isOpen state correctly controls the letter panel's rise-out animation classes. Fix any event propagation issues that might prevent clicks from registering. Ensure the toggle function properly updates React state and triggers re-renders.
